combinations.example: I came across an old photo.

The sun rises.

chinese: 得到; 获得; 变得

combinations.example: I get up at seven every day.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I received a letter.

Do you understand?

combinations.example: Never give up on your dreams.
She gave away her old clothes.
Give back the book when you finish.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He provided me with advice.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I yielded to temptation.

Go away and leave me alone.

combinations.example: I will not let you down.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Allow me to help.

combinations.example: I can't make out the words.

He compelled me to go.

combinations.example: I won't put up with this noise.

They did over the whole room.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Perform your duty.
I completed the work.
He manages without help.

combinations.example: She had on a red dress.
I had her out to the cinema.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I possess a car.

He consumed his breakfast.
He spoke a few words.
She expressed her opinion.
The clock indicates noon.

chinese: 看见; 理解; 会见

combinations.example: We saw her off at the station.
See to it that the door is locked.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I perceived a light ahead.
Do you understand the point?
I will visit the doctor.

She summoned a doctor.
The flame emitted smoke.
It is possible that it will rain.
You are permitted to leave now.
Perhaps she knows the answer.
He intends to help us.
The sun is going to rise at six.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The sun will rise at six.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Are you willing to go?

chinese: 关于; 大约; 周围

paraphrasing_examples.normal: We discussed the matter.
It is roughly ten miles.
She walked here and there in the room.

chinese: 穿过; 横过; 在对面

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He traversed the bridge.
They reside on the opposite side of the street.
She encountered an old friend by chance.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She came across an old friend.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Subsequent to the meal, they walked.
He is pursuing fame.
The police are searching for him.

chinese: 反对; 靠着; 防备

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He opposed the plan.
She leaned on the wall.
You should prepare for emergencies.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: You should be ready against emergencies.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He was included in the group of winners.
Divide the cake between the children.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Divide the cake among the children.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She felt she was with friends.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She felt she was among friends.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He is located in the office.
The train moves with a speed of sixty miles per hour.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The train goes at sixty miles per hour.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She glanced toward me.
Prior to breakfast, he exercises.
She stood in front of the door.
I have never encountered such a thing previously.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I have never seen such a thing before.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He stood in the space separating the two trees.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He stood between the two trees.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The secret is only known to you and me.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The secret is between you and me.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She had to select one of the two.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She had to choose between the two.

chinese: 由; 通过; 在……旁边

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The book was authored by her.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The book was written by her.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She travels via train.
He sat beside the window.
He descended the stairs.
Prices are decreasing.

He originated in London.
The shop opens starting at nine.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The shop is open from nine.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She was suffering due to a cold.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She was suffering from a cold.

chinese: 在……里面; 在……期间; 用

paraphrasing_examples.normal: They are inside the house.
He will return during two hours.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He will be back in two hours.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She expressed it using English.

chinese: 离开; 脱离; 关掉

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The bird flew away from the branch.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The bird flew off the branch.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Switch the light to the inactive position.
He removed his hat from his head.

chinese: 在……之上; 关于; 开着

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The book is resting upon the table.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The book is on the table.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He presented a lecture about history.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He gave a talk on history.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Please activate the light.

chinese: 在……上方; 超过; 结束

paraphrasing_examples.normal: A bridge spans above the river.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: A bridge is over the river.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The match has finished.
He has more than a thousand books.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He has over a thousand books.

chinese: 穿过; 通过; 从头到尾

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He entered via the door.
She persisted and completed the task.
I read the document completely.
He traveled towards London.
She gave the book for me.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She gave the book to me.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: It is a quarter before ten.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: It is a quarter to ten.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The cat is beneath the table.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The cat is under the table.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The project is still in progress.
Children below twelve years are not permitted.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Children under twelve are not allowed.

chinese: 向上; 起来; 完了

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He ascended the ladder.
The time has expired.
What is happening?
He cut it using a knife.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He cut it with a knife.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She arrived accompanied by her mother.
I am in agreement with you.

chinese: 作为; 如同; 当……时

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He works in the capacity of a teacher.
While I was walking, it began to rain.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: As I was walking, it began to rain.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She is equally tall as her brother.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She is as tall as her brother.

chinese: 为了; 给; 因为; 对于

paraphrasing_examples.normal: This gift is intended for you.
He stayed owing to his mother.
We walked a duration of three hours.
The color belonging to the sky is blue.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The color of the sky is blue.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He drank some water.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He drank a glass of water.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She is a woman possessing great wisdom.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She is a woman of great wisdom.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: We waited until morning.
He will not stop until he succeeds.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He will not stop till he succeeds.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The shop stays open until nine.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The shop is open till nine.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She is more intelligent compared to me.
He would sooner die rather than surrender.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He would die rather than give up.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: There is no alternative except to go.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: There is no other choice than to go.

chinese: 这; 那; 这些; 那些
所有的; 全部的; 一切

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Every one of the students passed.
I consumed the entirety of the cake.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I ate all of the cake.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The total amount of money is gone.

chinese: 任何; 一些; 任一

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Do you have even a small amount of money?
Select whichever book you like.
I do not have ink at all.
Each individual student has a book.
He visits each Sunday.
All things are in order.

chinese: 少的; 小的; 少量的

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She has a small amount of money.
The child is small in size.
A minor hope remains.

chinese: 许多的; 大量的; 非常

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He has a large amount of work.
I like it to a great extent.
There is not a great quantity of time.
There is not any hope.
He does not have a home.
That is not a small problem.
The remaining persons went home.
Show me a different one.
They assist one another.

chinese: 一些; 某个; 大约

paraphrasing_examples.normal: A few people left early.
Give me a bit of water.
Certain day he will come.
A person of this kind is hard to find.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Such a person is hard to find.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The pain was so great that he cried.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The pain was such that he cried.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I have never encountered things like that.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I have never seen such things.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Which person did this?
The man that I saw was tall.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The man who I saw was tall.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: For what person is this letter?
He likes tea as well as coffee.
Come, then we will talk.
She is clever in addition to being pretty.
He stayed home due to illness.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He stayed home because he was ill.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The reason for her tears was sadness.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: She cried because she was sad.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I left, for I was tired.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I left because I was tired.

chinese: 但是; 然而; 除了

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He is wealthy, yet he is unhappy.
All except one came.
She tried hard; however, she failed.

chinese: 或者; 否则; 还是

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Will you drink tea? Alternatively, will you drink coffee?
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Will you have tea or coffee?

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Hurry up; otherwise you will be late.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Hurry up or you will be late.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I do not possess a house nor a car.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I have no house or car.

chinese: 如果; 是否; 即使

paraphrasing_examples.normal: In the event that it rains, we stay in.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: If it rains, we stay in.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I wonder whether he is coming.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I wonder if he is coming.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Even supposing that I were rich, I would not be wasteful.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Even if I were rich, I would not waste.

chinese: 虽然; 尽管; 不过

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Despite the fact that it was raining, he went out.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Though it was raining, he went out.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He is old; nevertheless, he is strong.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He is old; he is strong, though.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Notwithstanding his poverty, he is honest.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Though he is poor, he is honest.

chinese: 当……的时候; 而; 虽然

paraphrasing_examples.normal: During the time that I read, she slept.
He is tall whereas she is short.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He is tall while she is short.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Although admitting he was wrong, he did not apologize.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: While he was wrong, he did not say sorry.

chinese: 如何; 怎样; 多么

paraphrasing_examples.normal: In what manner did you do it?
What an extremely beautiful sight!
Please explain the method of making it.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Tell me how to make it.

chinese: 何时; 当……时; 那时

paraphrasing_examples.normal: At what time will you come?
At the moment that I saw him, I stopped.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: When I saw him, I stopped.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The time at which he arrived was late.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: When he got there was late.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: At what location do you live?
This is the place in which I was born.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: This is where I was born.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: To what destination are you going?
For what reason did you leave?
The reason for which he came is unknown.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Why he came is not clear.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: That explains the cause of your anger.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: That is why you are angry.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Please repeat what you said.
I will visit once more.
He reiterated his question.

chinese: 曾经; 永远; 究竟

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Have you visited Paris at any time?
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Have you ever been to Paris?

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She lived happily for all time after.
This is the best I have encountered in my life.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: This is the best I have ever seen.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The station is a long distance away.
This is significantly better.
He traveled a great distance.

chinese: 向前; 前进; 将来

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He stepped ahead.
She put forth a suggestion.
We are looking to the future.

chinese: 这里; 在这儿; 向这里

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Please arrive at this place.
At this location is the book.
Put the bag at this spot.

chinese: 附近; 靠近; 几乎

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The shop is in close proximity.
She lives close to the school.
He was close to death.

chinese: 现在; 如今; 立刻

paraphrasing_examples.normal: At the present moment, we must go.
Immediately after that, he understood.
In the current time, things are different.

chinese: 出; 向外; 不在; 熄灭

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He exited from the room.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He went out of the room.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The fire has been extinguished.
The secret has been revealed.

chinese: 仍然; 还是; 静止的

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He continues to be alive.
Nevertheless, we must proceed.
The night remained calm and quiet.

chinese: 然后; 那时; 那么

paraphrasing_examples.normal: At that time, he was young.
We ate, and after that we left.
If that is so, I will go.

chinese: 那里; 在那儿; 到那里

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Your book is at that place.
We traveled to that location.
A man exists at the door.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: There is a man at the door.

chinese: 一起; 共同; 同时

paraphrasing_examples.normal: They worked in cooperation.
The couple remains united.
Mix all the parts into one.

chinese: 好; 很好地; 健康的

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He performed the task in a satisfactory manner.
Is she in good health?
She speaks English proficiently.
The work is nearly complete.
He very nearly fell.
It is practically ten o'clock.

chinese: 足够的; 充足的; 够

paraphrasing_examples.normal: We have a sufficient amount of food.
He is adequately tall.
That is a sufficient quantity.

chinese: 甚至; 即使; 平坦的

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He works on Sundays as well as other days.
The surface is flat and level.
A child would understand that.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: Even a child would see that.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I do in no way understand.
He is completely unaware of the facts.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He is not aware of the facts.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: She failed to arrive.

chinese: 只有; 仅仅; 唯一的

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He is merely a child.
The sole reason for his absence was illness.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The only reason he was out was illness.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Just yesterday I saw him.
He is rather clever.
I am entirely ready.
That is not completely correct.

chinese: 如此; 这么; 所以

paraphrasing_examples.normal: He is extremely kind.
I was tired; therefore I went to bed.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: I was tired, so I went to bed.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Do it in this manner.
The book is extremely good.
He is the exact person I need.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: He is the very person I need.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: I am greatly pleased.
We will go on the day after today.
The future will bring better days.
The meeting is scheduled for the following day.
I saw him on the day before today.
She arrived the previous day.
The events of the prior day are forgotten.
They traveled in a direction opposite to the south.
A cold wind came from the northern direction.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: A cold wind came from the north.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The city is situated in the northern part of the country.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The city is in the north of the country.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Birds fly in a direction opposite to the north in winter.
A warm wind came from the southern direction.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: A warm wind came from the south.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The island lies in the southern part of the sea.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The island is in the south.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The sun rises in the direction opposite to the west.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The sun rises in the east.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: They traveled toward the eastern region.
The wind blows from the oriental direction.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The wind is from the east.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: The sun sets in the direction opposite to the east.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The sun goes down in the west.

paraphrasing_examples.normal: They traveled toward the western region.
The storm arrived from the occidental direction.
paraphrasing_examples.basic: The storm came from the west.

chinese: 请; 使高兴; 愿意

paraphrasing_examples.normal: Kindly come in.
She made an effort to satisfy him.
Do as you wish.
Indeed, that is correct.
He gave an affirmative answer.
Acknowledged, I understand.
